# =================================================
# SEW=8
# =================================================
# VSETVLI SEW=8 LMUL=1
VINST=00000000000000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

# VSLT v1 = v0 < v0
VINST=01101100000000000000000011010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMSIF v2, v1
VINST=01010000000100011010000101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMSOF v3, v1
VINST=01010000000100010010000111010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMAND v4 = v2 & v3
VINST=01100100001100010010001001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMOR v5 = v2 | v3
VINST=01101000001100010010001011010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# -------------------------------------------------
# LMUL=2
# -------------------------------------------------
# VSETVLI SEW=8 LMUL=2
VINST=00000000000100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

# VSLT v2 = v0 < v0
VINST=01101100000000000000000101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMSIF v4, v2
VINST=01010000001000011010001001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMSOF v6, v2
VINST=01010000001000010010001101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMAND v8 = v4 & v6
VINST=01100100011000100010010001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMOR v10 = v4 | v6
VINST=01101000011000100010010101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# -------------------------------------------------
# LMUL=4
# -------------------------------------------------
# VSETVLI SEW=8 LMUL=4
VINST=00000000001000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

# VSLT v4 = v0 < v0
VINST=01101100000000000000001001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMSIF v8, v4
VINST=01010000010000011010010001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMSOF v12, v4
VINST=01010000010000010010011001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMAND v16 = v8 & v12
VINST=01100100110001000010000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMOR v20 = v8 | v12
VINST=01101000110001000010001001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# -------------------------------------------------
# LMUL=8
# -------------------------------------------------
# VSETVLI SEW=8 LMUL=8
VINST=00000000001100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

# VSLT v8 = v0 < v0
VINST=01101100000000000000010001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMSIF v16, v8
VINST=01010000100000011010100001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMSOF v24, v8
VINST=01010000100000010010110001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMAND v0 = v16 & v24
VINST=01100101100010000010000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VMOR v8 = v16 | v24
VINST=01101001100010000010010001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0
